caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a grey, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. He is positioned in front of a professional silver microphone held by a black boom arm; the arm features the white text " Rode NT1-A". Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. Initially, his mouth is open and his hands are out of view, but as the sequence progresses, he raises his hands and moves them in a descriptive motion. His facial expression remains animated as he continues to talk, with his gaze shifted slightly to the side. The camera remains static, capturing the man from the chest up as he interacts with someone off-screen.
